changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO case_zaken_api_sync ( case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, assignee_sync_enabled, roltype_url, note_sync_enabled, note_subject ) SELECT ztl.case_definition_key, ztl.case_definition_version_tag, false, NULL, true, COALESCE(NULLIF(pc.properties->>'noteSubject', ''), 'Note created by Valtimo GZAC') FROM plugin_configuration pc JOIN zaak_type_link ztl ON ztl.zaken_api_plugin_configuration_id = pc.plugin_configuration_id WHERE pc.plugin_definition_key = 'zakenapi' AND (pc.properties->>'noteEventListenerEnabled')::boolean = true AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM case_zaken_api_sync existing WHERE existing.case_definition_key = ztl.case_definition_key AND existing.case_definition_version_tag = ztl.case_definition_version_tag );

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO case_zaken_api_sync ( case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, assignee_sync_enabled, roltype_url, note_sync_enabled, note_subject ) SELECT ztl.case_definition_key, ztl.case_definition_version_tag, false, NULL, true, COALESCE( NULLIF(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pc.properties, '$.noteSubject')), 'null'), ''), 'Note created by Valtimo GZAC' ) FROM plugin_configuration pc JOIN zaak_type_link ztl ON ztl.zaken_api_plugin_configuration_id = pc.plugin_configuration_id WHERE pc.plugin_definition_key = 'zakenapi' AND JSON_EXTRACT(pc.properties, '$.noteEventListenerEnabled') = TRUE AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM case_zaken_api_sync existing WHERE existing.case_definition_key = ztl.case_definition_key AND existing.case_definition_version_tag = ztl.case_definition_version_tag );
